# Web Application Templates

Frontend web application starter templates

| Template | Description | Install |
|----------|-------------|---------|
| [Designsystemet Basic React App](designsystemet-basic-react-app) | React app with Designsystemet components, Vite, and TypeScript | `dev-template designsystemet-basic-react-app` |
